mapper.update:
UPDATE student
name = #{name},
no = #{no},
gender = #{gender},
phone = #{phone},
degree = #{degree},
clazz_id = #{clazzId},
violation_count = #{violationCount},
violation_score = #{violationScore},
update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: select( case when degree = 1 then '初中' when degree = 2 then '高中' when degree = 3 then '大专' when degree = 4 then '本科' when degree = 5 then '硕士' when degree = 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) as name, count(*) as `value` from student group by degree

select (case when clazz_id = 1 then 'JavaEE就业163期' when clazz_id = 2 then 'JavaEE就业165期' when clazz_id = 4 then '前端就业90期' when clazz_id = 6 then 'JavaEE就业166期' when clazz_id = 7 then '大数据就业58期' when clazz_id = 8 then 'JavaEE就业167期' when clazz_id = 10 then 'JavaEE就业201期' when clazz_id = 11 then 'Python试学210期' when clazz_id = 12 then 'JavaEE就业222期' when clazz_id = 15 then 'Python就业188期' else '其他' end) as name, count(*) num from student group by clazz_id order by num
